name: blake-as
description: Portable, SIMD-accelerated BLAKE3 for AssemblyScript - SWAR and degree-4 SIMD, dispatched at compile time.
author: Jairus <me@jairus.dev>

scripts.verify: asc assembly/blake3/index.ts -o build/blake3-verify.wasm -O3 --noAssert --uncheckedBehavior always --runtime stub --exportRuntime --disable simd && asc assembly/blake3/index_simd.ts -o build/blake3-simd-verify.wasm -O3 --noAssert --uncheckedBehavior always --enable simd --runtime stub --exportRuntime && node scripts/verify-blake3.mjs && node scripts/verify-blake3-simd.mjs
scripts.charts: npm run charts:build && npm run charts:serve
scripts.report: npm run bench && npm run charts:build
